name: FIRST HAWAIIAN, INC.
business: First Hawaiian, Inc. (FHI) is a bank holding company that owns 100% of First Hawaiian Bank (FHB), which provides a diversified range of banking services to consumer and commercial customers, including deposit products, lending services, and wealth management. The Bank operates a network of 49 branches in Hawaii, Guam, and Saipan. As of December 31, 2025, FHB is the largest bank headquartered in Hawaii as measured by loans and leases and net income.
sellsTo: Consumer customers in Hawaii, Guam, and Saipan
Commercial customers including middle market and large Hawaii-based businesses

exposures.sentence: Our ability to identify and address cybersecurity risks;
the development and use of AI;

in addition, as customer preferences and expectations continue to evolve, technology has lowered barriers to entry and made it possible for banks to expand their geographic reach by providing services over the internet and for non-banks, such as financial technology firms, to offer products and services traditionally provided by banks, such as automatic transfers and automatic payment systems, without the need of physical branches.
